patient_summary: 73-year-old female (name: Olivia) with documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, postoperative/unspecified anemia, and a recorded diagnosis of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major scheduled procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Notable laboratory abnormalities (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2. Additional historical labs include elevated glucose 199 (01/11/2021) and prior lipid panels. Multiple care teams documented including Hand HA MD (PCP), Hershey CL MD, Roberts JD DO, and cardiology/endocrinology specialists. Several social and functional status entries and demographic elements conflict across source documents and are preserved in conflicts for review.
